summary: Tested PaperSumo API security headers, eLife datasets, and frontend navigation. All backend tests pass (15/15). Frontend pages load correctly. eLife datasets verified in code and API.

issues: Auth modal pops up when clicking time range tabs (This Week/All Time) - may be expected behavior for filtering

context_for_next_testing_agent: The Summarizer Cross-Model section (GPT vs Gemini vs Opus) is admin-only. To test the eLife datasets dropdown in UI, must login via Admin panel first. Backend API returns eLife datasets correctly (verified via /api/validation/datasets). All 4 security headers (HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy) are present on all API responses.
